meta.title: DMCA Policy
meta.description: Submit a DMCA takedown request for content that infringes on your copyright.

header.title: Digital Millennium Copyright Act
header.subtitle: Submit a takedown request. We review every notice and act on legitimate claims promptly.

form.title: Notification of Claimed Infringement
form.description: Use this form to request the removal of recordings that infringe your copyright. We respond to legally valid DMCA notices and disable accounts of repeat infringers in appropriate circumstances.

description.label: Describe the copyrighted work
description.description: What is the original content? When was it created or first published? The more detail you give, the faster we can verify your claim.
description.placeholder: e.g. My livestream broadcast on Twitch as @mychannel on March 15, 2024 from 8–10pm EST, covering the launch of my new song 'Title'.

urls.label: URLs of the infringing recordings
urls.description: One URL per line. These are the recordings on LiveStreamRecorder you are asking us to remove.

copyrightType.label: I am submitting this notice as
copyrightType.authorized: An authorized representative of the copyright owner

email.label: Your email address
email.description: We will use this to respond to your request.

perjury.title: By checking the following boxes, I state UNDER PENALTY OF PERJURY that:
perjury.warning: Please read each statement carefully before checking.
perjury.goodFaith: I have a good faith belief that the use of the copyrighted material described above is not authorized by the copyright owner, its agent, or the law (e.g., as a fair use).
perjury.accurate: The information in this notice is accurate and, under penalty of perjury, I am the owner or authorized to act on behalf of the owner of an exclusive right that is allegedly infringed.
perjury.acknowledge: I acknowledge that under Section 512(f) any person who knowingly materially misrepresents that material or activity is infringing may be subject to liability for damages.

signature.label: Typed signature
signature.description: Type your full legal name. Must exactly match the First and Last name above — it acts as your digital signature.
signature.mismatch: Signature must exactly match your First and Last name.

form.footer: We respond to all valid DMCA requests. Abuse of this process may result in legal consequences.

submitted.title: DMCA Request Submitted
submitted.description: We have received your DMCA takedown request. We will review it and respond to the email address you provided.
